name: Act It Out
description: No talking, no props — just your body! Act out these words and phrases for your team.

cards.charadesHint: Move your arms in a breaststroke or front crawl motion through the air
Mime twirling a fork and slurping long noodles into your mouth
Crouch down and mime looping and tying laces on your shoe
Strum an imaginary guitar and move your fingers along an invisible fretboard
Mime holding a toothbrush and scrubbing back and forth across your teeth
Sit down and mime pulling oars through water on both sides
Hold an imaginary phone at arm's length, smile, and press the shutter button
Mime gripping a heavy barbell, straining to lift it overhead, then dropping it
Build up with a slow inhale, tilt head back, then explode forward dramatically
Grip an imaginary jar with one hand and struggle to twist the lid off with the other
Hold an imaginary lead that keeps tugging you forward unexpectedly
Hold an imaginary phone and rapidly tap both thumbs on the screen
Bounce up and down rhythmically while holding imaginary reins and clicking your tongue
Mime lying down asleep, then make exaggerated deep breathing and snoring motions
Swing an imaginary racket, track an invisible ball, and pivot side to side on the court
Lay out an imaginary garment on a flat surface and slide a heavy iron back and forth
Step your feet alternately and grab upward rungs with your hands, looking nervous below
Mime placing a box on paper, folding the edges, pulling tape, and tying a bow
Dip an imaginary roller in a tray and sweep it up and down a large invisible wall surface
Curl your fingers safely and mime rapidly chopping down with a knife on a board
Move slowly into a warrior pose, then a tree pose with arms raised and one leg up
Strike imaginary cymbals and drums alternately with both hands and a foot on the kick pedal
Flick a rod back over your shoulder and then cast forward, waiting patiently for a bite
Kneel down, pack imaginary sand into a bucket, flip it over, and carefully decorate the top
Hold an imaginary cone and lick around it quickly before it drips down your hand
Stand tall, raise a baton, and sweep your arms in wide, expressive arcs in all directions
Hold two imaginary needles and loop yarn over them repeatedly in a rhythmic motion
Stand sideways, push off with one foot, crouch to turn, and mime a jump trick
Knead and press down rhythmically on an imaginary person's back and shoulders
Punch and flatten an imaginary dough ball, then spin it in the air above your head
Bounce with increasing height, bend your knees on landing, and throw in a seat drop
Study an imaginary board intensely, pick up a piece with two fingers, and place it carefully
Kneel beside a car wheel, loosen bolts, pull the flat tyre off, and wrestle a new one on
Look in an imaginary mirror and apply mascara, lipstick, and blush with careful precision
Lie flat paddling, then jump up sideways with arms out, riding an invisible wave
Mix imaginary batter in a bowl, pour it into a tin, slide it into the oven, and wait excitedly
Dribble an imaginary ball, pivot, and leap to shoot it through a hoop above your head
Reach up to grip an invisible ledge, find footholds with your feet, and haul yourself upward
Carry a heavy imaginary watering can and tilt it gently over each plant in turn
Circle your hips in wide rhythmic loops as if keeping an invisible hoop spinning
Extend your right hand forward, grip an invisible hand firmly, and pump it up and down
Hold a small imaginary balloon, take a deep breath, and blow into it repeatedly until it's huge
Dribble an invisible ball with your feet, dodge, and kick it hard into the goal
Grip imaginary handles and push forward, occasionally stopping to rock it gently
Sit upright, nod your head slowly, and jolt awake with wide eyes repeatedly
Spin imaginary handles at your sides and jump rhythmically as the rope passes under your feet
Lean over an enormous invisible cauldron and stir with huge effort, wiping your brow
Hold an imaginary deck and flick cards one by one to different people around the table
Glide backward smoothly while appearing to walk forward, channelling your inner pop legend
Crouch beside an imaginary cow and squeeze and pull downward alternately with both hands
Grip a tiny imaginary paddle and bat a fast invisible ball back and forth across a low table
Plunge an imaginary shovel into deep snow, scoop it up, and hurl it to the side repeatedly
Pull back an imaginary bowstring slowly, take aim with one eye closed, and release
Hop on one leg pulling up tight rubber legs, wrestle your arms in, and zip up the back
Show both hands empty, make a flourish, and produce an imaginary object from nowhere
Lean urgently over an invisible keyboard and hammer keys at frantic speed, looking panicked
Sit in an imaginary car seat, grip the wheel, glance in mirrors, and slowly reverse and angle in
Extend arms for balance and walk heel-to-toe along an invisible thin line, wobbling nervously
Grip an imaginary mallet and bat a floating puck back and forth across a frictionless table
Push a spade into the ground with your foot, lever earth up, and toss it behind you repeatedly
